title: selaginella aurea
intro: Selaginella aurea, also known as Goldback Fern, is a species of plant belonging to the genus Selaginella, a type of spore-producing vascular plant commonly referred to as a living fossil. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella aurea include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and preventing oxidative stress, which can contribute to various diseases such as cancer, diabetes, and cardiovascular disease. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
